content.en:
"True River Sword Ancestor, have you broken into the Traceless Tower?"

Ye Tian asked curiously.

"I've passed!" True River Sword Ancestor said: "I only broke through the fifth layer, the same as the last time, so there is no reward, we are waiting for the Qingxu Source Ancestor, he only broke through the fourth layer last time, this time he broke through to the extreme realm, he should be able to break through the fifth layer." The rewards for the fifth tier are still quite good. "

Ye Tian didn't wait for the Qingxu Origin Ancestor, he went directly to the first layer of the Traceless Tower.

The first layer of the Traceless Tower is easy to break through, and as long as the strength is at the top of the Nine Heavens, there is a certain hope of breaking through the first layer.

In the first layer.

A space-time dragon python actually appeared.

"It's not a real space-time dragon python, it's a space-time dragon python formed by the condensation of the formation!"

Ye Tian recognized it.

Rumble!

Ye Tian punched it over, directly blasting the space-time dragon python.

That's how the first floor has passed!

After breaking through the first layer, Ye Tian received a reward.

"Dragon's Whisker Sacred Stone!"

The value of this reward is not low, after the Dragon Whisker Sacred Stone is refined, it can be worn on the body and tempered all the time, which is not of much help to the Ninefold Supreme, but for those who have a low cultivation, the value of the Dragon Whisker Sacred Stone is precious.

Originally, Ye Tian couldn't recognize the Dragon Whisker Sacred Stone, but after becoming the thirteenth ancestor of the Source God Pavilion, he naturally obtained a list of treasures from the twelve ancestors, including the treasures born in the space-time territory.

And there is no Dragon Whisker Sacred Stone in the Source Sea, it was born in the space-time territory.

"The Dragon Whisker Sacred Stone won't help me much, but it can be used by Yue'er!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

Subsequently, Ye Tian went to break through the second layer of the Traceless Tower, but the result was still easy to break through.

The corresponding requirement of the second layer is the half-step Eternal Realm, if it is the strength of an ordinary half-step Eternal Realm, it will not be able to break into the second layer at all.

The strength corresponding to the third layer is the powerful half-step Eternal Realm.

The strength corresponding to the fourth layer is the top half-step Eternal Realm.

The fifth layer requires the strength of the Extreme Realm.

Ye Tian broke through the Traceless Tower layer by layer, and quickly passed the fourth layer, and the reward he received was not low, especially after breaking through the fourth layer, the reward he got turned out to be the Void God Leaf.

The Void Divine Leaf is a life-saving treasure that can instantly pierce through the void and escape, and the Void Divine Leaf can also mask the breath and shield any probing power.

Even the Ninefold Peerless One, once they used the Void Divine Leaf, they would be able to escape from the pursuit of the Extreme Realm level.

Of course, for the Eternal Realm, the Void Divine Leaf was of little use.

But even so, in the Source Sea, the Void Divine Leaf was enough to send people to one of the top ten escape treasures, and it couldn't be traded at all, because it could only be used three times at most, so it was too rare and too rare, and no one would be stupid enough to trade it.

After breaking through the fourth layer, Ye Tian-level obtained the Void God Leaf, and his luck was definitely good.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian came to the fifth layer of the Traceless Tower.

The fifth layer requires the strength of the Extreme Realm to break through, and Ye Tian did not enter the Traceless Territory with the Eternal Realm Finger, so he would not have been able to break through here.

However, he first went to Donghui Mountain to improve his strength.

Now, his strength has increased greatly, and he is almost not much worse from the Extreme Realm, coupled with the life-saving ability of the Endless Eternal Body, he should have a certain hope of breaking through the fifth layer.

Even the True River Sword Ancestor felt that the reward of the fifth layer was very precious, and it must be very good, so he naturally wanted to break through the fifth layer.

Soon, the fifth floor arrived!

Rumble!!!!!

A space-time dragon python comparable to the Polar Realm appeared.

Maybe its real combat effectiveness is a little worse than that of the One Pole Realm, but it is definitely not much worse.

For a half-step Eternal Realm powerhouse at the level of the First Extreme Realm, it would take a long time to break through the fifth layer, and even a long battle would take a long time.

Ye Tian knew very well that if he wanted to kill this space-time dragon python, he would not be able to do it in a short period of time.

"Then consume him!"

Ye Tian decided.

Bang!!!!

Ye Tian's battle with this space-time dragon python began.

As soon as they fought, Ye Tian was slightly weak, but he barely resisted and was not injured.

Time passed slowly, and Ye Tian relied on the Endless Eternal Body to delay the battle, and from time to time he gave the space-time dragon python a blow and gave it a little injury.

And although the space-time dragon python can also hurt Ye Tian, Ye Tian's recovery ability is too terrifying, and it recovers almost instantly.

Time passed slowly, although Ye Tian's consumption was very large, he also absorbed resources from the inner world to recover energy, this was not cheating, and the Traceless Tower would not care.

I don't know how long it has been, Ye Tian finally consumed this space-time dragon python and broke through the fifth layer.

At this time, the injuries of Ye Tian's replica body were also relatively light, and after a while, the injuries were all recovered.

This time, Ye Tian didn't seem to have paid any price to break through the fifth layer.

But he knew very well that if he hadn't improved his cultivation and strengthened his strength, he probably wouldn't be able to hurt the space-time dragon python, and if he couldn't hurt the space-time dragon python, no matter how long he fought, he wouldn't be able to kill the space-time dragon python.

Clearly, he made the right decision.

The fifth floor was passed, and the reward given by the Traceless Tower also appeared.

Wow!

A treasure appeared in front of him.

It's a legacy ball!

"Legacy!"

Ye Tian had some expectations, what was the inheritance from the Eternal Realm Lord?

If it's a general inheritance, then he's not interested, but what if it helps him?

Ye Tian directly accepted the inheritance, and soon the inheritance ended, and the inheritance ball also collapsed directly, obviously a one-time inheritance ball, if it is an inheritance ball that can be continuously inherited, then the value is enough to make a force rise completely.

But the more advanced the inheritance, the more troublesome it is to manufacture, and it is not even tolerated by heaven and earth, so it is naturally impossible to inherit too many times, which is a limitation.

"World of Wills!"

This is a secret art of inheritance, a secret art that helps to improve the will.

"It seems that the Traceless Lord has studied the will very deeply, and his territory has the Rift Wind Valley that refines the will, and he has also made a secret technique of the will world!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

But after reading this secret technique of the Will World, he felt that the person of the Traceless Lord was a madman.

The volitional world forms hundreds of millions of volitional worlds all over the body, and the will is so strong that it can even make the body burst out with explosive power and combat power beyond the limit.

Even, the will can influence the innate eternal rules.

After the world of will reaches the ninth order, the will can directly shatter the innate eternal rules and shatter the physical body of the eternal realm.

However, this is an incomplete secret technique, and every step of cultivation is very dangerous.

What's more, the will is too difficult to improve, and it is almost impossible to reach the ninth order of the will world, which is a secret technique imagined by the Traceless Lord.

Moreover, ordinary clones cannot cultivate the world of will at all, because the doppelganger is not an ontology, does not have some of the abilities that the ontology has, and cannot withstand the world of will.

But who would dare to test the body?

"Could it be that the Traceless Lord let many people cultivate the Will World and use them as experiments, causing many people to die, and even capturing many geniuses, and finally angering a certain powerful Eternal Realm, and finally being killed. "

Ye Tian guessed.

Instantly, he smiled.

This secret technique suits him perfectly!

His copy body is no different from the main body, and he can use the copy body to cultivate the will world, even if it collapses, there is nothing to do.
